phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è la biglietteria automatica, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH lah bee-lyet-teh-REE-ah ow-toh-MAH-tee-kah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, on the left.

responses.english: On the ground floor, on the left.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si trova il binario nove, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see TROH-vah eel bee-NAH-ree-oh NOH-veh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Al primo piano, seguire le indicazioni.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL PREE-moh pee-AH-noh seh-goo-EE-reh LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee
likely_response.translation_en: On the first floor, follow the signs.

responses.english: On the first floor, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: AHL PREE-moh pee-AH-noh seh-goo-EE-reh LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee
responses.local: Al primo piano, seguire le indicazioni.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, c'è un deposito bagagli, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, cheh oon deh-POH-zee-toh bah-GAH-lyee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, ground floor, near the exit.

responses.english: Yes, ground floor, near the exit.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si convalida il biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see kon-VAH-lee-dah eel bee-LYET-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the yellow machines on the platform.

responses.english: At the yellow machines on the platform.
